programme.desc: A widower's close relationship with his daughter is tested after he falls in love with a beautiful doctor.

programme.title: Super Noypi

programme.title: Can We Still Be Friends?
programme.desc: Digs and Sam break up and keep tabs on each other's relationships.

programme.title: Askal
programme.desc: Having lived in poverty, a young man decides to help poor people lead a better life and stop them from following the path of crime.

programme.title: Raketeros
programme.desc: Some middle-aged male friends get into a heap of trouble as they try to recover a priceless dress that they lost after a night of partying.

programme.title: Gorio & Tekla
programme.desc: Gorio learns about his half-brother, Tekla, a man from the mountain, after the death of his father. They meet and later fall for the same rich, handsome bachelor.

programme.title: Pulis Patola 2
programme.desc: Two clumsy police officers who are terrible at their jobs decide to take on a gang of criminals to stop them from disrupting the peace in the city.

programme.title: Agent X44
programme.desc: A fledgling agent does everything he can to prove himself when he is assigned to find a stolen dagger once owned by a revered national hero.

programme.title: Lagalag: The Eddie Fernandez Story
programme.desc: Filipino action star Eddie "Lagalag" Fernandez is convicted and jailed for his role in a homicide.

programme.title: Ika-11 Utos: Mahalin Mo, Asawa Mo
programme.desc: Newlywed Soledad learns her husband Roy is psychotic, altering between tenderness and violence when she disobeys his orders.

programme.title: Shake Rattle & Roll 13
programme.desc: Rival witches take over the bodies of two teenagers in "Parola," one of three horror tales; the others are "Tamawo" and "Rain, Rain Go Away.".

programme.title: Sin Island
programme.desc: After his wife seems to lose interest in him, a photographer travels to an exotic island where he begins a dangerous affair with a recently separated woman.

programme.title: Agent X44
programme.desc: A fledgling agent does everything he can to prove himself when he is assigned to find a stolen dagger once owned by a revered national hero.

programme.title: Just the 3 of Us
programme.desc: Two unlikely strangers find love as unforeseen circumstances force them to live under the same roof.

programme.title: Dear Other Self
programme.desc: A woman debates whether to stay with her current job or to pursue her passion for traveling.

programme.title: Padre Kalibre
programme.desc: Despite the danger he may face, Father Lazaro, a priest in a small town, boldly resists the illegal plans of corrupt congressman Cortez.

programme.title: Kusina Kings
programme.desc: Best friends Benjie and Ronnie challenge their rival to a cooking competition in an attempt to make their restaurant more popular. However, things do not go the way they plan.

programme.title: Enteng the Dragon
programme.desc: Enteng, a kind food cart vendor, stumbles upon Kuto, the heir to the Tibetan Lama. When a cult abducts Kuto, Enteng embarks on a journey to find him and defeat the cultists.

programme.title: Princess Dayareese
programme.desc: Romance blossoms after a princess offers her look-alike a large amount of money to switch places with her.

programme.title: Love or Money
programme.desc: After persistent Leon sweeps her off her feet, ambitious Angel must choose between true love and her dreams of a luxurious life.

programme.title: Ang Lihim NG Golden Buddha
programme.desc: This dramatic exposé features the testimony of Rogelio Roxas who risked his life to reveal the secrets of the hidden treasure which allegedly involved ex-President Marcos.

programme.title: Bocaue Pagoda Tragedy

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up. But after the storm clears, Tony challenges the brothers to a camel race in order to get their help tracking down Cleve – and he wins! Now the Bedouins have to take the kids to the Eye of the Sahara, a huge strange storm that they know has something to do with Cleve’s plot. Elsewhere in the Sahara, Ms. Nowhere and Gary are captured by Cleve.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

programme.title: Four Corners - Episode 15
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Media Watch - Episode 16
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Chips
programme.desc: Dr Karl crunches into the crispy, salty, science packed world of chips, proving there's more to one of the nation's favourite treats than meets the mouth.

programme.title: Restoration Australia - Manly Bower, NSW
programme.desc: Host Anthony Burke meets a couple supersizing a beachside bungalow into a Sydney trophy home while still somehow trying to preserve its quaint 1920's identity.

programme.title: Larapinta - Episode 6
programme.desc: Talia nears the end of her journey at Kati Thanda (Lake Eyre), and reflects on what she has learnt. Above all, Talia questions what role she has in creating a better future for the Larapinta River for all Australians. (Final)

programme.title: The Truth About Fasting - A Catalyst Special - The Truth About Fasting
programme.desc: Intermittent fasting is growing in popularity, and aside from weight loss, there are claims it can improve our health. Dietician Dr Joanna McMillan tracks 5 people fasting to understand the benefits and impacts on our bodies.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 105
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite to Eat with Alice - Astrid Jorgensen
programme.desc: Astrid and Alice are a duet in perfect harmony, flipping, tossing and turning tempeh into a hit!

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 16
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 147
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 83
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: Restoration Australia - Manly Bower, NSW
programme.desc: Host Anthony Burke meets a couple supersizing a beachside bungalow into a Sydney trophy home while still somehow trying to preserve its quaint 1920's identity.

programme.title: The World - Episode 83
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Stuff the British Stole - Irish Giant

programme.title: Bondi Rescue - Episode 1

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: A man enlists the help of a woman and her kids to land the woman of his dreams.

programme.title: Ultraviolet
programme.desc: In a future ruled by biotech tyranny, infected warrior Violet battles to protect a child carrying humanity’s last hope, igniting a violent rebellion.

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: A womanizing Viagra salesman with no sense of direction or responsibility falls in love with a free-spirited woman.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Discover how objects perform motion, and learn about the source of light, sound, heat and electricity, along with their uses.

programme.title: Grade 6 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa wastong paggamit ng pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang may lapi, at iba't ibang uri ng pangungusap. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng lagom, pagsusuri ng pahayag, at kumuha ng impormasyon sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 6 Math
programme.desc: Understand the nature of solid figures, sequences in forming rules, expressions and equations. Learn more about rate and speed, and of area and surface area of plane and solid or space figures.

programme.title: Grade 6 English
programme.desc: Know how to present reports of differing viewpoints and how to evaluate narratives.

programme.title: Grade 6 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano unawain at pahalagahan ang pagpupunyagi ng mga Pilipino tungo sa pagtugon sa mga suliranin, isyu at hamon ng kasarinlan.

programme.title: Grade 6 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about gravity, friction and how they affect movement of objects, alongside how energy is transformed in simple machines.

programme.title: Grade 9 Filipino
programme.desc: Suriin ang iba't ibang uri ng panitikan tulad ng parabula, elehiya, at alamat, at ang pinagmulan ng mga salita at pag-uugnay ng sariling karanasan sa mga tekstong binasa.

programme.title: Grade 9 Math
programme.desc: Discover the key concepts of parallelograms and triangle similarity.

programme.title: Grade 9 English
programme.desc: Learn the difference of biases from prejudice and the relevance and validity of information presented.

programme.title: Grade 9 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang mga pangunahing kaalaman tungkol sa pambansang ekonomiya bilang kabahagi sa pagpapabuti ng pamumuhay ng kapwa mamamayan tungo sa pambansang kaunlaran.

programme.title: Grade 9 Science
programme.desc: Know more about the volcanoes found in the Philippines, the factors that affect climate, the effects of changing climate, and how to adapt accordingly. Discover the relationship between the constellations in the sky and Earth's position along its orbit.

programme.title: Preschool | ECCD
programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Kindergarten
programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Grade 1 Language
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang konsepto ng pagbabaybay, panghalip, pangngalan, salitang naglalarawan, at ang pagtukoy ng sariling ideya at opinyon tungkol sa napakinggang kuwento.

programme.title: Grade 1 Math
programme.desc: Know more about fractions 1⁄2 and 1/4, 2-dimensional and 3-dimensional figures, as well as continuous and repeating patterns and mathematical sentences.

programme.title: Grade 1 Reading & Literacy
programme.desc: Learn about polite expressions and how to talk about oneself, one’s family and one’s personal experiences.

programme.title: Grade 1 Makabansa

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
